headline: Is It Time To Reassess Agilent Technologies (A) After Its Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: If you are wondering whether Agilent Technologies at around US$112.75 is starting to look attractively priced, the recent share performance gives you a lot to think about. The stock has seen a 2.3% decline over the last week, a 10.4% decline over the last month, and is down 18.3% year to date and 7.7% over the past year, which may reflect shifting views on its risk and return profile. Over the past few years the share price performance has also been weak, with a 15.9% decline over three...

headline: Assessing Agilent Technologies (A) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Agilent Technologies (A) has been drawing attention after recent share price weakness, with the stock down about 10% over the past month and 17% over the past 3 months. This has prompted fresh interest in its valuation. See our latest analysis for Agilent Technologies. That recent 10% 30 day share price decline and 17.5% 90 day share price decline come on top of a 7.7% 1 year total shareholder return loss.
